parameters.content: Attach this workflow in AutoApplyOps workflow settings as the Error workflow. It starts from Error Trigger, sanitizes the failure context, and creates an owner-alert payload without leaking raw applicant data.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => ({ json: { ...item.json, notificationChannel: 'workflow-owner', notificationStub: `[AutoApplyOps] ${item.json.workflowName} failed in execution ${item.json.executionId}: ${item.json.errorMessage}` } }));
